description: Vulnerability in the Oracle HRMS (US) product of Oracle E-Business Suite (component: US Payroll Year End).  Supported versions that are affected are 12.2.3-12.2.15. Easily exploitable vulnerability allows low privileged attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise Oracle HRMS (US).  Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in  unauthorized access to critical data or complete access to all Oracle HRMS (US) accessible data as well as  unauthorized update, insert or delete access to some of Oracle HRMS (US) accessible data. CVSS 3.1 Base Score 7.1 (Confidentiality and Integrity impacts).  CVSS Vector: (CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:N).
